rationale: Review 1's proposed generalization (to arbitrary s : Set B) is feasible from the shown proofs but not material under generality: singleton fibers are the natural/primary case for deck transformations (and fiberHomeomorph), the eq_comm is a harmless proof artifact, and no use-site in the diff justifies the broader API; acting on it forces needless edits. Review 2 correctly identifies the existing level as sufficient, so the approve path yields the better merged PR.
